title: The Tea (Marketing) Control Amendment Order, 2016

(ii) *f s r f l ^ ^ n ¥ ^T.3*T. 472(3T) dl()<sl 20.6.1989 £TTT ^rTfSTd" f%TT Trrr § ^ WTc^fT ^ft£FT 3Tf^JxFTT t W\M. 697(3T), mfm 23.7.2001 £KT f^TT *RT I ORDER New Delhi, the 25th October, 2016 S.O. 3318(E).—In exercise of the power conferred by sub-sections (3) and (5) of section 30 of the Tea Act, 1953 (29 of 1953), the Central Government hereby makes the following Order further to amend the Tea Warehouses (Licensing) Order, 1989, namely:- 1. Short Title and Gommencement.—(1 )This Order may be called the Tea Warehouses (Licensing) Amendment Order, 2016. (2) It shall come into force on the date of its publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Tea Warehouses (Licensing) Order, 1989, in paragraph 2, in sub-paragraph (1),- (a) in item (b), for the word "Chairman", the words "Deputy Chairman" shall be substituted; (b) for item (f), the following shall be substituted, namely:- "(f) "Licensing Authority" means the Deputy Chairman of the Board or the Executive Director, Guwahati or the Executive Director, Coonoor of the Board, as the case may be."; (c) in Form B, for the word "Chairman", the words "Deputy Chairman, Executive Director, Guwahati, Executive Director, Coonoor" shall be substituted. [F. No. T-12012/1/2016-Plant (A) Pt.-I] ALOK VARDHAN CHATIJRVEDI, Addl. Secy. Notification Number.
